goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve the americas food and should be in the centre. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves british food. Make sure you get address, phone number, and price range. You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called lovell lodge. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 2 nights starting from tuesday. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the hotel by 21:00. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, I'm looking for a restaurant that serves American food and is in the center of town.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The Gourmet Burger Kitchen is located on Regent Street in City Centre.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: That sounds good.  Can you provide me with their contact info?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Their phone number is 01223312598. Do you need more information?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: What is the price range?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: It is expensive, but very good.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I also need a hotel called lovell Lodege

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I will book it for you,is there anything else I can do for you ?

goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should include free parking. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should be in the type of guesthouse. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 4 nights starting from friday. If the booking fails how about 2 nights. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel and should be in the moderate price range. Make sure you get address and food type. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to leave the hotel by 06:30. Make sure you get contact number and car type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I need a place to stay located in North Cambridge that has free parking.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have 8 guesthouses and 2 hotels in that area with free parking. Do you have a price range or rating in mind?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, I would like a 3 star guesthoise please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: hamilton lodge suits all your description

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Okay, please book that 2 people and 4 nights starting from Friday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I have made those reservations for you your reference number is G3PHR3FO.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am also looking for a good restaurant in the same north part of town.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There are many good restaurants in that area. Do you have a cuisine preference?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I would like it to be in the moderate range please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: There is a Chinese and an Indian moderately priced  restaurant in the north part of town. Would you like to book one?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you tell me the address for the Chinese restaurant

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: The address for the Chinese restaurant is 191 Histon Road Chesterton.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Please book a taxi. I want to depart the hotel at 06:30 and go to the restaurant. Give me car type and contact info

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: A red skoda will be arriving to take you to the Golden Wok. The contact number is 07740908114. Is there anything else I can do for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No, that is all I need today. Thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Alright, have a nice day!

goal.description: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants. You are looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called bridge guest house. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 6 people and 3 nights starting from thursday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the cheap price range. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 14:00 on the same day. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve chinese food and should be in the expensive price range. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 14:45 on saturday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 0 and should include free wifi. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should include free parking. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 4 nights starting from the same day. If the booking fails how about 2 nights. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type

goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should serve belgian food. If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves indian food. Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 16:00 on sunday. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called autumn house. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 4 nights starting from the same day. Make sure you get the reference number. You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places. You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time. Make sure you get contact number and car type
